basic_details.job_title: IIT Tirupati Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Tirupati (IIT Tirupati) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 16 July 2026 on the official website https://www.iittp.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Tirupati Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age relaxation will be provided as per the rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.S.-M.S. 5-year Integrated in Physics/Mathematics or 2-year M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics or B.S./B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Engineering Physics or M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics and Communication with minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA
qualification.details: B.S.-M.S. 5-year Integrated in Physics/Mathematics or 2-year M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics or B.S./B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Engineering Physics or M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics and Communication with minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA. Relaxation of marks: 55% for OBC/EWS, 55% for SC/ST/PWD (equivalent CGPA). Coursework in Classical Information Theory, Quantum Information Theory, Quantum Computation or related areas is desirable.

salary_details.details: Rs. 27000 Per Month + HRA as applicable

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Tirupati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_tirupati: B.S.-M.S. 5-year Integrated in Physics/Mathematics or 2-year M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics or B.S./B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Engineering Physics or M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics and Communication with minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA

content_sections.heading: IIT Tirupati Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Tirupati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Tirupati Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Tirupati Project Assistant Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.S.-M.S. 5-year Integrated in Physics/Mathematics or 2-year M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics or B.S./B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Engineering Physics or M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics and Communication with minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA. Relaxation of marks: 55% for OBC/EWS, 55% for SC/ST/PWD (equivalent CGPA). Coursework in Classical Information Theory, Quantum Information Theory, Quantum Computation or related areas is desirable.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age relaxation will be provided as per the rules.

content_sections.heading: Salary/ Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 27000 Per Month + HRA as applicable

content_sections.heading: IIT Tirupati Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Tirupati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Tirupati Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at IIT Tirupati?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Assistant position at IIT Tirupati is 31st July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.S.-M.S. 5-year Integrated in Physics/Mathematics, a 2-year M.Sc. in Physics/Mathematics, or a B.S./B.Tech./B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering/Engineering Physics, or an M.Tech./M.E. in Electronics and Communication with at least 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant position is 32 years. Specific age relaxations may apply for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 27,000 plus applicable House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position in this recruitment drive by IIT Tirupati.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Project Assistant role at IIT Tirupati is entirely online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position will primarily involve an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Tirupati located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Tirupati (IIT Tirupati) is located in Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at IIT Tirupati is a contractual job. This means the appointment is for a fixed tenure, as specified in the appointment letter.
